dishes.name: Dal Baati Churma
dishes.description: THE iconic Rajasthani trio - baked wheat balls served with 5-lentil dal and sweet crumbled wheat with ghee
dishes.notes: Must-have signature dish. Needs specialist Rajasthani cook.

dishes.name: Gatte ka Pulao
dishes.description: Fragrant rice cooked with besan (gram flour) dumplings and Rajasthani spices

dishes.name: Ker Sangri
dishes.description: Desert bean and caper berry dry preparation - quintessential Rajasthani delicacy
dishes.notes: Needs sourcing of dried ker-sangri from Rajasthan

dishes.name: Papad ki Sabzi
dishes.description: Curry made from broken papad pieces in yogurt-based gravy

dishes.name: Bajre ki Roti + Lehsun Chutney
dishes.description: Pearl millet flatbread served with spicy garlic chutney

dishes.name: Churma Ladoo
dishes.description: Sweet balls of crumbled wheat flour cooked in ghee with dry fruits and jaggery

dishes.name: Mawa Kachori
dishes.description: Deep fried flaky pastry stuffed with sweetened khoya and dry fruits

dishes.name: Pyaaz Kachori
dishes.description: Flaky deep-fried pastry stuffed with spiced onion filling

dishes.name: Mirchi Vada
dishes.description: Large green chili stuffed with spiced potato, battered and deep fried
dishes.notes: Jodhpuri street food - great for late night

dishes.name: Ghevar
dishes.description: Disc-shaped honeycomb sweet made from ghee, flour, and sugar syrup, topped with rabri and nuts
dishes.notes: Needs specialist. Check seasonal availability for April.

dishes.name: Moong Dal Halwa
dishes.description: Slow-cooked green gram halwa with generous ghee and dry fruits - premium Marwari wedding sweet
dishes.notes: Very labor-intensive. Mark of a proper Marwari wedding feast.

dishes.name: Mohan Thal
dishes.description: Dense besan-based fudge with cardamom and nuts - Rajasthani mithai

dishes.name: Besan Chakki
dishes.description: Dense gram flour sweet cooked with ghee and sugar

dishes.name: Balushahi
dishes.description: Flaky deep-fried sweet soaked in sugar syrup

dishes.name: Boondi Raita
dishes.description: Yogurt mixed with crispy besan droplets, cumin and coriander

dishes.name: Sindhi Kadhi
dishes.description: Thick gram flour curry with bhee (lotus stem), drumstick, cluster beans and okra - NOT like Rajasthani or Gujarati kadhi
dishes.notes: Signature Sindhi dish. Needs specialist who knows Sindhi kadhi.

dishes.name: Sai Bhaji
dishes.description: One-pot spinach, chana dal, fenugreek and mixed vegetable mash - quintessential Sindhi comfort food
dishes.notes: Comfort food that every Sindhi guest will appreciate

dishes.name: Koki
dishes.description: Thick onion, green chili and cumin flatbread - Sindhi breakfast staple

dishes.name: Dal Pakwan
dishes.description: Chana dal served with crispy fried flatbread (pakwan) - classic Sindhi breakfast
dishes.notes: THE Sindhi breakfast. Must-have for morning event.

dishes.name: Aloo Tuk
dishes.description: Double-fried thick potato slices - crispy outside, soft inside, with Sindhi masala

dishes.name: Seyal Maani
dishes.description: Bread cooked in spiced tomato-onion gravy - Sindhi comfort food
dishes.notes: Great comfort food for late night supper

dishes.name: Sindhi Tahiri
dishes.description: Sweet saffron rice with potato, whole spices and nuts - festive Sindhi dish

dishes.name: Sindhi Samosa
dishes.description: Potato filling with pomegranate seeds and distinct Sindhi masala - different from regular samosa

dishes.name: Kheerni
dishes.description: Sindhi sweet vermicelli pudding with cardamom, nuts and saffron

dishes.name: Patata
dishes.description: Thin gravy Sindhi potato curry - different from aloo tuk
dishes.notes: Light curry, good complement to heavier dishes

dishes.name: Mitho Lolo
dishes.description: Sweet Sindhi flatbread made with jaggery, ghee and wheat flour
dishes.notes: Sweet bread unique to Sindhi cuisine

dishes.name: Sindhi Kulfadi
dishes.description: Sindhi-style kulfi with cardamom, saffron and nuts

dishes.name: Vada Pav
dishes.description: Spiced potato fritter in soft pav bun with dry garlic chutney and green chutney

dishes.name: Pav Bhaji
dishes.description: Mixed vegetable mash with butter-toasted pav, topped with onion, lemon and coriander

dishes.name: Bhel Puri
dishes.description: Puffed rice tossed with chutneys, onion, tomato and sev

dishes.name: Sev Puri
dishes.description: Crispy puris topped with potato, chutneys, onion and sev

dishes.name: Misal Pav
dishes.description: Spicy sprouted moth bean curry topped with farsan, served with pav
dishes.notes: Nashik is famous for misal - local connection!

dishes.name: Dabeli
dishes.description: Sweet-spicy potato filling in pav with pomegranate, peanuts and special masala

dishes.name: Kanda Poha
dishes.description: Flattened rice tempered with mustard seeds, onions, peanuts and curry leaves

dishes.name: Tawa Pulav
dishes.description: Mumbai-style spiced rice cooked on tawa with pav bhaji masala and vegetables

dishes.name: Litti Chokha
dishes.description: Baked wheat balls stuffed with sattu (roasted gram) served with mashed potato-tomato-eggplant chokha

dishes.name: Sattu Paratha
dishes.description: Flatbread stuffed with spiced roasted gram flour mixture

dishes.name: Thekua
dishes.description: Deep-fried sweet made from wheat flour, jaggery and coconut - Bihari festive sweet

dishes.name: Makhana Kheer
dishes.description: Fox nut (lotus seed) pudding with milk, cardamom and nuts
dishes.notes: Light and cooling - good for April

dishes.name: Chura Matar
dishes.description: Flattened rice with green peas, tempered with mustard oil and spices

dishes.name: Chura Dahi
dishes.description: Flattened rice with sweetened yogurt, sugar and banana

dishes.name: Khaja
dishes.description: Layered flaky sweet from Bihar, soaked in sugar syrup - similar to baklava

dishes.name: Laung Latika
dishes.description: Clove-studded sweet pastry filled with khoya and sealed with a clove

dishes.name: Dubki Wala Aloo
dishes.description: Light Bihari potato curry in thin spiced gravy

dishes.name: Mathura ke Pede
dishes.description: Iconic milk fudge from Mathura - grooms Vrindavan family connection
dishes.notes: Source from Mathura if possible for authenticity

dishes.name: Agra ka Petha
dishes.description: Translucent ash gourd sweet from Agra - soft and mildly flavoured

dishes.name: Bedmi Puri + Aloo Sabzi
dishes.description: Puffed bread with urad dal filling served with spiced potato curry

dishes.name: Rabri Jalebi
dishes.description: Crispy fresh jalebi topped with thick sweetened milk rabri
dishes.notes: Vrindavan specialty - great for late night

dishes.name: Thandai
dishes.description: Spiced chilled milk with almonds, fennel, rose petals, saffron and pepper
dishes.notes: THE Vrindavan drink. Must-have for welcome.

dishes.name: Mysore Pak
dishes.description: Rich ghee and besan sweet from Mysore - melt in mouth texture

dishes.name: Bisi Bele Bath
dishes.description: Spiced rice and lentil one-pot dish from Karnataka with vegetables

dishes.name: Filter Coffee
dishes.description: Traditional South Indian decoction coffee with frothed milk

dishes.name: Rava Idli
dishes.description: Semolina steamed cakes with cashew, mustard seeds and curry leaves

dishes.name: Masala Dosa
dishes.description: Crispy rice-lentil crepe with spiced potato filling, served with sambhar and chutney

dishes.name: Hummus
dishes.description: Chickpea dip with tahini, lemon juice, garlic and olive oil

dishes.name: Falafel
dishes.description: Deep-fried spiced chickpea patties served with tahini sauce

dishes.name: Kunafa
dishes.description: Shredded pastry layered with cheese/cream filling, soaked in sugar syrup with pistachio

dishes.name: Luqaimat
dishes.description: Emirati sweet dumplings drizzled with date syrup and sesame

dishes.name: Manakish / Zaatar Bread
dishes.description: Flatbread topped with zaatar herb mix and olive oil

dishes.name: Karak Chai
dishes.description: Strong sweet cardamom tea with evaporated milk - ubiquitous in the Gulf

dishes.name: Aam Panna
dishes.description: Raw mango cooler with roasted cumin, mint and jaggery
dishes.notes: Perfect for April heat in Nashik

dishes.name: Jaljeera
dishes.description: Cumin and mint spiced water - digestive and cooling

dishes.name: Masala Chaas
dishes.description: Spiced buttermilk with roasted cumin, curry leaves and ginger

dishes.name: Sattu Sherbet
dishes.description: Roasted gram flour drink with lemon, salt and spices - Bihar specialty

dishes.name: Solkadi
dishes.description: Kokum and coconut milk drink - pink, tangy and refreshing

dishes.name: Rose Sherbet
dishes.description: Rose-flavored sweet drink with basil seeds - classic wedding beverage

dishes.name: Ice Bhel
dishes.description: Chilled bhel puri with sweetened yogurt, pomegranate, sev and tangy chutneys — refreshing twist on classic bhel
dishes.notes: Great for hi-tea, refreshing cold chaat perfect for April weather

dishes.name: Ragda Pattice
dishes.description: Crispy potato patties topped with spiced white peas curry, chutneys and sev
dishes.notes: Classic Mumbai street food, great for live chaat station

dishes.name: Samosa Chaat
dishes.description: Crushed samosa topped with chickpea curry, yogurt, chutneys and sev
dishes.notes: Crowd favourite chaat, works at any event

dishes.name: Raj Kachori
dishes.description: Large crispy kachori filled with potato, sprouts, yogurt, chutneys and sev

dishes.name: Pani Puri
dishes.description: Crispy hollow puris filled with spiced water, potato and chickpeas
dishes.notes: Best as live station, always a crowd hit

dishes.name: Dahi Puri
dishes.description: Crispy puris filled with potato, sweet yogurt, chutneys and sev

dishes.name: Aloo Tikki Chaat
dishes.description: Crispy potato patties topped with chickpea curry, yogurt, chutneys and sev

dishes.name: Tokri Chaat
dishes.description: Edible potato basket filled with yogurt, sprouts, pomegranate and chutneys
dishes.notes: Elegant presentation chaat, great for wedding

dishes.name: Puran Poli
dishes.description: Sweet flatbread stuffed with jaggery and chana dal filling, served with ghee
dishes.notes: Classic Maharashtrian sweet, great cultural touch for a Nashik wedding

dishes.name: Kothimbir Vadi
dishes.description: Crispy steamed and fried coriander leaf fritters with besan — classic Maharashtrian snack
dishes.notes: Perfect Maharashtrian touch for a Nashik wedding

dishes.name: Sabudana Vada
dishes.description: Crispy deep-fried tapioca and potato patties with peanuts — popular Maharashtrian fasting snack
dishes.notes: Crowd-pleaser Maharashtrian snack, pairs well with green chutney

dishes.name: Thalipeeth
dishes.description: Multi-grain spiced flatbread made with bhajani flour — traditional Maharashtrian staple
dishes.notes: Great for breakfast, authentic Maharashtrian touch

dishes.name: Batata Vada
dishes.description: Spiced potato fritters coated in besan batter and deep fried — the soul of vada pav
dishes.notes: Standalone snack or with pav; bride's favourite vada pav connection
